queries.question: List all field trip and study group classes where either is for a real-world application.
queries.sql:
SELECT Classes.Name 
FROM LearningActivities JOIN Classes ON Classes.ClassID = LearningActivities.ClassID
WHERE (LearningActivities.ActivityType = "Field Trip" OR LearningActivities.ActivityType = "Study Group") AND LearningActivities.Purpose = "Real-world Application"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?learningactivities a :LearningActivities .
  ?classes a :Classes .
  ?learningactivities p:hasClasses ?classes .
  ?classes p:name ?name .
  ?learningactivities p:ActivityType ?activitytype_w .
  ?learningactivities p:ActivityType ?activitytype_w2 .
  ?learningactivities p:Purpose ?purpose_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?activitytype_w) = "Field Trip" || STR(?activitytype_w2) = "Study Group")) && STR(?purpose_w) = "Real-world Application"))
}

queries.question: List all field trip classes and study group classes that are for real-world applications.
queries.sql:
SELECT Classes.Name 
FROM LearningActivities JOIN Classes ON Classes.ClassID = LearningActivities.ClassID
WHERE LearningActivities.ActivityType = "Field Trip" OR LearningActivities.ActivityType = "Study Group" AND LearningActivities.Purpose = "Real-world Application"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?learningactivities a :LearningActivities .
  ?classes a :Classes .
  ?learningactivities p:hasClasses ?classes .
  ?classes p:name ?name .
  ?learningactivities p:ActivityType ?activitytype_w .
  ?learningactivities p:ActivityType ?activitytype_w2 .
  ?learningactivities p:Purpose ?purpose_w .
  FILTER((STR(?activitytype_w) = "Field Trip" || (STR(?activitytype_w2) = "Study Group" && STR(?purpose_w) = "Real-world Application")))
}
